title: EFFECT OF DROUGHT ON THE LIVELIHOOD OF SMALLHOLDER FARMERS AND THEIR COPING MECHANISMS IN JANAALE TOWN SOMALIA
author: Hassan Ahmed Mohamed
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study asses effects of drought on smallholder farmers, their coping and adaptation strategies, in Janaale town. Using quantitative approaches, the study employed structured questionnaires, simple random sampling method was used on households
steps_raw: This study asses effects of drought on smallholder farmers, their coping and adaptation strategies, in Janaale town. Using quantitative approaches, the study employed structured questionnaires, simple random sampling method was used on households
